curation_notes: Patch commit 457fae0 identified from PR #897 referenced in the v10.26.0 release notes ('fix(security): block Object.prototype filter/tag lookups (RCE)'). Parent commit 3616a74 is the pre-patch commit. Only 1 non-test source file changed (src/liquid.ts): the fix replaces plain {} initializers for filters and tags with Object.create(null) to eliminate Object.prototype inheritance. Location derived from the patch diff — the vulnerability is in the class property declarations of the Liquid class. No sibling files share this pattern since the Liquid class is defined solely in src/liquid.ts. Vulnerability class kept as command-injection (pre-assigned from CWE-94): although the root cause is prototype chain traversal enabling code injection, the practical exploitation achieves arbitrary OS command execution via child_process.execSync, and command-injection is the closest available class.
